sub_fields.message: List of all US States or Countries (Canada) that Black Tie Ski rentals services.

sub_fields.label: CTA Text
sub_fields.name: cat_cta_text
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. View All Bikes. Leave empty for single-package categories (CTA shows on the card instead).

sub_fields.label: Packages
sub_fields.name: packages
sub_fields.instructions: 3+ packages → slider  |  2 packages → 2-col grid  |  1 package → featured horizontal card

sub_fields.label: Badge (optional)
sub_fields.name: pkg_badge
sub_fields.instructions: Only used on single-package categories. e.g. "Guided Experience".
